title: SVG2OOXML Corpus Metadata
description: Metadata for real-world SVG test corpus files

decks.description: Sample design system components with gradients and filters
decks.notes: Gradients and simple filters should render natively. Complex shadows may fall back to EMF.
decks.license: Sample/Example - Not from actual Figma export

decks.description: Sample illustration with complex gradients and masks
decks.notes: Complex gradient transforms and masks may require EMF fallback.
decks.license: Sample/Example - Not from actual Sketch export

decks.description: Sample vector artwork with paths and clip paths
decks.notes: Simple vector art should render mostly natively. Clip paths supported.
decks.license: Sample/Example - Not from actual Illustrator export

notes: This is a sample corpus metadata file demonstrating the expected format.
Real-world corpus files should be added by collecting actual SVG exports from Figma, Sketch, and Adobe Illustrator.
Each deck should include licensing information and source attribution.
Expected rates are estimates based on feature complexity analysis.
Baselines should be generated using the corpus runner with legacy mode first.
